featured.subject_subtitle: How AI is reshaping product discovery at scale
featured.summary: Lena shared how her team at a leading e-commerce platform rebuilt their search and recommendation engine using LLMs. A fascinating look at the gap between AI hype and production reality.

client_pipeline.ask: Explore how AI can improve speed and accuracy of credit risk decisions
client_pipeline.answer: CF proposed an LLM-assisted triage layer feeding into existing risk models

client_pipeline.ask: Reduce time clinicians spend on admin by automating note summarisation
client_pipeline.answer: Pilot using Claude to summarise unstructured clinical notes into structured handoffs

client_pipeline.ask: Build an AI-first support experience that reduces human escalations
client_pipeline.answer: CF designed an agentic support flow handling tier-1 queries end to end

client_pipeline.ask: Use AI to predict infrastructure failures before they cause disruption
client_pipeline.answer: CF proposed an ML pipeline ingesting sensor data to flag anomalies 48hrs in advance

evangelist_shoutouts.key_insight: AI tooling cutting cycle time on risk model experiments from weeks to days
Agentic support handling tier-1 queries with measurable drop in human handoffs
Early pilot showing significant admin time saved through automated note summarisation
